assumptions: The intragroup dividend has given rise to a recognised receivable in a foreign currency.
The question concerns the accounting in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRS 9 requirements on designation of hedged items in consolidated financial statements, including the treatment of intragroup monetary items and foreign currency risk.

approaches.label: Foreign currency translation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IAS 21 requirements for exchange differences on monetary items, including intragroup monetary balances in consolidated financial statements when hedge accounting is not applied.
